c1.speaker: poppy
c1.line: Mr. Gibbons — if it's about last night I have prepared a statement, the statement is 'I don't know anything,' which is TRUE, and also I've reorganized the entire contingency binder because SOMETHING had to be alphabetical today—

c2.speaker: gary
c2.line: Deep breath, Poppy. I'm still working out where the door of this story is. When I find it, I'll knock gently.
